creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #15)
Sure, I will do that. But I'd like to first get this committed to FreeBSD, since it would be nice if it could make it to releng/13.2 before the RELEASE. Then we could drop LTO hacks for powerpc64 from ports.

Does your comment mean approval for src commit?
